narrative:
Deerfield Twp B (precinct in Warren County) has 795 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
